# Animal Module

## Introduction

### Figure

This is a great example of how to set up a module. 


![Animal module icon](resources/animal.png){#fig-animal-icon width=35%}




Type 2


![](resources/animal.png){#fig-animal-icon fig-cap="Animal module icon" width=35%}



Type 3 


![](resources/animal.png){#fig-animal-icon fig-alt="Animal module icon" fig-cap="Animal module icon" width=35%}




### Table
| Variable | Definition |
|---|---|
| heiferI_num | Number of Heifer I animals |

: Example animal inputs {#tbl-animal-inputs}
